acceptance_criteria.criterion: run-eval.sh performs deterministic checks and writes review results
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Phase A (lines 56-139): artifact existence, file_ownership, acceptance criteria. Phase B (lines 144-309): dimension evaluation. Review result written atomically with schema-compliant plan_completion
Prompt assembled at lines 81-101, model invocation via claude --model, fallback to prompt file, result with cross_model: true and schema-compliant plan_completion

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Both use select-dimensions.sh for mode-aware dimension loading
acceptance_criteria.evidence: run-eval.sh line 146 and cross-model-review.sh line 50 both call select-dimensions.sh

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: Both scripts implement spec faithfully. run-eval.sh covers Phase A+B with deterministic dimension checks. cross-model-review.sh builds prompts and handles CLI/fallback. Both produce schema-compliant output

dimensions.name: error-handling
dimensions.evidence: Argument validation, state/definition file checks, select-dimensions.sh failure caught, jq/yq errors handled. cross-model-review.sh: JSON parse failure writes .raw diagnostic. yq uses --arg for safe interpolation

dimensions.name: security
dimensions.evidence: No secrets. Variables quoted. cross-model-review.sh uses yq --arg for deliverable name (fix 6). evaluate-gate.sh validates verdict enum (fix 7)

dimensions.name: performance
dimensions.evidence: run-eval.sh 369 lines justified by clear 3-section structure. Git diff data gathered once and reused

dimensions.name: maintainability
dimensions.evidence: Clear section headers, descriptive variable naming, case statement for extensible dimension checks. select-dimensions.sh now has header comment (fix 8)
